title: Kanban Item
description: Type for items rendered in the Kanban component.

props.name: index
props.description: Index of the item inside its status list.

props.name: statusKey
props.description: Key of the status (column) the item belongs to.

props.name: cssClass
props.description: Optional CSS class applied to the item container.

props.name: description
props.description: Optional description or subtitle for the item.

props.name: priority
props.description: Priority of the item, affecting the indicator color.
